ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget allocated to the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the manager */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date of hiring */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department managed */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating of the manager */,
  "leadership_skill" INTEGER /* Leadership skill rating of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_managers_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "performance_score" INTEGER /* Performance score */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "next_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the next performance review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_records" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who attended the training */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "training_topic" TEXT /* Topic of the training */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Name of the trainer */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer */,
  "training_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training session in hours */,
  "training_cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the training session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_records_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "behavioral_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being assessed */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  "communication_skill" INTEGER /* Communication skill rating */,
  "behaviour" INTEGER /* Behavior rating */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessor */,
  "assessor_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessor */,
  "next_assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the next behavioral assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_behavioral_assessments_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)
column_names: ID of the manager responsible for the department
Date of birth of the manager
Leadership skill rating of the manager
Unique identifier for each performance review
ID of the employee being reviewed
Date of the next performance review
